architecture: Feature-based / Sovereign Cluster — frontend and backend fully decoupled in dev

root_structure..crustagent/: CrustAgent©™ intelligence — skills, vibecheck, memories, knowledge, rules
root_structure.src/: React frontend in feature clusters (pages, components, services, lib, context)

technical_stack.frontend: Vite 6 + React 19 + TSX + Tailwind CSS 4 (port 8282 in dev)
technical_stack.infrastructure: Docker + Docker Compose (optional), fuser-based scuttle scripts
technical_stack.process_mgmt: npm scripts with & backgrounding + fuser for stop

key_scripts.start: NODE_ENV=production tsx server.ts & (requires prior npm run build)
key_scripts.start-dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev & (backend + Vite in parallel)

notes: Full audit pass: all skills updated to PinchPad current state, GitHub Actions workflow configured with test gate, truthpack verified complete
